sn46.26:2.1: Here (and at SN 46.28:2.1) the terms beginning with “abundant” are added to the usual formula; they are more familiar from the divine meditations (SN 42.8:12.1).
sn46.26:2.2: Here we find a succinct presentation of the three “rounds” of dependent origination: defilements, deeds, and results. See SN 12.38:1.2 and note for discussion.
